error_signature: retry count data is lost in fallback loop
title: Retry count data lost in HTTP fallback loop
symptom: The HTTP node does not retain the retry count when looping through fallback logic, causing infinite loops instead of exiting after the intended count.
applies_when: Using HTTP node with retry count
not_this_if: Retry count is set correctly and exits as expected
root_cause: The HTTP node's retry count is not preserved across iterations in the fallback loop, leading to a situation where the workflow does not recognize the maximum retry attempts and continues indefinitely.
fix_steps: Duplicate the True output wires from the IF node.
Connect one wire to the HTTP node and the other to input 2 of the Merge node.
Test the workflow to ensure it exits after the specified number of retries.
agent_instruction: Duplicate the True output wires from the IF node to maintain retry count and ensure proper flow.
